title: carex × christii
intro: Carex × christii, also known as Christ's sedge, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Christ's sedge include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Carex × christii include teas, infusions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to fully understand its medicinal potential.
